name: law firms managing 10-20 clients tool
description: For law firms managing 10-20 clients, compliance reporting delays cause missed deadlines. We automate compliance reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking compliance deadlines and generating accurate regulatory filings for multiple clients.
